note: Model presets — the token/cost lever. Roles are grouped; each preset maps a group to a capability tier (strong/mid/cheap); each adapter maps a tier to a concrete model. Claude Code applies models PER ROLE (enforced via each subagent's frontmatter). Codex and Gemini choose ONE model per session, so for them a preset is advisory — it recommends a session model. Evidence it's safe to downshift: X-MemoryArch found Haiku ≈ Sonnet (≤0.003 recall delta) for extraction-style work. Edit tierModels if a tool's model names change.

presetSummary.quality: Highest fidelity — bosses, gates, and heads on the strong model.
presetSummary.balanced: Default — strong bosses + gates, mid-tier heads and workers.
presetSummary.budget: Lowest cost — mid bosses + gates, cheap workers (Haiku-class).
